svg.title: Ariadne phylogeny preview
svg.desc: Compact phylogram rendered from the IQ-TREE result for downstream preview and reporting.
svg.text: Rendered from iqtree.treefile with 795 leaves and 36 candidate sequences.
Coral reference branches and candidate placements derived from the current phylogeny stage.
Preview view for Ariadne outputs. Use iqtree.treefile and iqtree.iqtree for full-resolution phylogenetic interpretation.
